territories.name: Foundations: Logic & Set Theory
territories.tagline: The bedrock — what mathematical objects are, and what counts as valid reasoning about them.

territories.name: Number Theory
territories.tagline: The deep behavior of whole numbers: primes, divisibility, and patterns hiding in plain sight.

territories.name: Algebra
territories.tagline: Structure and symmetry — operations on symbols, equations, and the abstract systems they generate.

territories.name: Linear Algebra
territories.tagline: Vectors, matrices, and flat spaces — the mathematics of proportional change, and the workhorse of computation.

territories.name: Geometry
territories.tagline: Shape, size, and space — from triangles and coordinates to curved surfaces and higher dimensions.

territories.name: Topology
territories.tagline: What survives stretching: the qualitative shape of spaces, ignoring distance and angle.

territories.name: Analysis & Calculus
territories.tagline: The mathematics of change and the infinitely small — limits, derivatives, integrals, and the real line under a microscope.

territories.name: Dynamics & Differential Equations
territories.tagline: Systems evolving in time: flows, feedback, stability, and long-run behavior from simple local rules.

territories.name: Probability & Statistics
territories.tagline: Reasoning under uncertainty — quantifying chance, and drawing honest conclusions from data.

territories.name: Discrete Math & Combinatorics
territories.tagline: Counting, arranging, and connecting finite structures — including the graphs that model networks everywhere.

territories.name: Applied & Computational Mathematics
territories.tagline: Mathematics meeting the world: models, algorithms, optimization, and computation at scale.

territories.name: Mathematical Practice
territories.tagline: How mathematics is actually done — proof techniques, problem-solving strategies, and the art of abstraction.
